scope: Post-P6 execution evaluation and observability slice

references: Section 5 / P0 — Freeze Execution / Pastikan Execution Tetap Off
Section 5 / P6 — Canary -> Promote -> Baru Evaluasi P1-D / Execution

changes_verified.summary: Broker executor returns a fail-closed disabled contract and suppresses broker calls when EXECUTION_ENABLED=0.
EA manager does not retry explicit execution_disabled results.
Runtime take-signal precheck clamps rollout to one trade per 30 minutes per symbol and three concurrent positions total.
Execution queue runtime endpoint exposes execution_enabled, broker_calls_suppressed, and ea_url for operator inspection.

open_gates: Gate Suitability still requires long-running adaptive telemetry, not part of this slice.
Gate Performance benchmark evidence is not attached in this verification artifact.
Gate Final Verification by independent reviewers is still pending.
notes: This artifact archives code-level verification for the post-P6 execution evaluation and observability slice only.
The artifact does not authorize live execution and does not override the requirement to keep execution fail-closed until broader verification gates are satisfied.
